backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the genealogy backend, implementing user profiles, manuscript management, family history, person records, and relationships with access control via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with their associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels, covering mutation hook fixes, cache invalidation, UI components, and backend endpoints.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, hook, and style file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, primary, secondary, accent, destructive, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled '邓氏家族族谱系统', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that gates access via a session-stored passcode, manages the active section state across five sections (manuscripts, history, people, interaction, contact), and renders the corresponding section component inside the Layout shell.
frontend/src/components/AncientManuscrip: React component for uploading and deleting ancient manuscript files, using passcode-gated modals for both actions and displaying a list of uploaded manuscripts with preview and date formatting.
A community interaction component that renders a forum-style post and reply system, allowing users to create, view, and delete posts and replies with passcode-protected deletion.
frontend/src/components/ContactClan.tsx: A multi-section contact management component for clan leaders, group contacts, help requests, and donation channels, supporting full CRUD operations with passcode-protected mutations.
frontend/src/components/DeletePasscodeMo: A modal dialog that prompts the user to enter a hardcoded delete passcode before confirming a destructive delete action.
frontend/src/components/FamilyActivities: A component for managing family activities with an image gallery, supporting creating, editing, and deleting activities and uploading/deleting activity images with passcode protection.
frontend/src/components/FamilyHistory.ts: A component that displays and allows passcode-protected editing of the family history text content fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main application layout component that renders a hero banner, top navigation bar with section switching, main content area, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/PasscodeGate.tsx: A full-screen passcode entry gate component that validates a hardcoded passcode ('dsjzsdxw') and calls `onAuthenticated` on success, showing a shake animation and error message on failure.
A directory component for listing, searching, adding, editing, and deleting family members, managing view state transitions between list, profile, add, and edit views with a delete confirmation modal.
frontend/src/components/PersonForm.tsx: A form component for creating or editing a person's profile, including fields for personal details and photo upload, gated behind an upload passcode modal before saving.
frontend/src/components/PersonProfile.ts: A detailed profile view for a family member showing bio, media gallery, and relationships tabs, with functionality to add/delete media and relationships and delete the person, all protected by passcode modals.
frontend/src/components/UploadPasscodeMo: A dialog modal that prompts the user for an upload passcode ('dsjzscxx') before confirming an upload or write operation, showing an error on incorrect input.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the user's Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend actor interactions including manuscripts, family history, people, relationships, posts, replies, activities, clan contacts, help requests, and donation channels.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up a traditional Chinese manuscript-inspired design system using Tailwind CSS, defining OKLCH color tokens, typography (Noto Serif/Sans SC), and utility component classes like manuscript borders and seal stamps.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Chinese-style fonts, OKLCH-based custom color tokens (seal, gold, parchment, ink, sidebar), custom shadows, border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Deng family genealogy system project (version 41), including architectural notes, known issues (mostly backend authorization mismatches and data persistence failures), and a list of existing features across all five sections.
